allow: Bash(node -e "import\(''pg''\).then\(async \({default:pkg}\)=>{const {Pool}=pkg;import\(''dotenv''\).then\(d=>{d.default.config\({path:''../.env''}\);const p=new Pool\({host:process.env.DB_HOST,user:process.env.DB_USER,password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD,database:process.env.DB_DATABASE,port:parseInt\(process.env.DB_PORT\)}\);p.query\(""SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=''public'' ORDER BY table_name""\).then\(r=>{console.log\(''Tables:''\);r.rows.forEach\(t=>console.log\(''-'',t.table_name\)\);p.end\(\);}\)}\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''pg''\).then\(async \({default:pkg}\)=>{const {Pool}=pkg;import\(''dotenv''\).then\(d=>{d.default.config\({path:''../.env''}\);const p=new Pool\({host:process.env.DB_HOST,user:process.env.DB_USER,password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD,database:process.env.DB_DATABASE,port:parseInt\(process.env.DB_PORT\)}\);p.query\(""SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name=''user_vocabulary''""\).then\(r=>{console.log\(''user_vocabulary columns:''\);r.rows.forEach\(c=>console.log\(''-'',c.column_name,'':'',c.data_type\)\);p.end\(\);}\)}\)}\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Service | Where-Object { $_Name -like ''*postgres*'' } | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status")
